symptom_vector: node CPU overload with high CPU usage and CPU saturation

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: aiops-k8s-03 节点因 node_cpu_usage_rate 指标异常飙升导致节点级CPU压力故障
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 aiops-k8s-03 节点的 node_cpu_usage_rate 指标从正常中位数26.58%飙升至故障中位数92.81%，变化率高达110.95%
Step 2: 分析 aiops-k8s-03 节点的 node_memory_usage_rate 指标也从32.2%上升至48.21%，变化率为39.82%，显示节点级资源耗尽
Step 3: 确认运行在 aiops-k8s-03 节点上的多个服务（shippingservice-2, recommendationservice-1, adservice-0, paymentservice-1, cartservice-0, frontend-0）出现rrt_max指标大幅上升，符合节点资源争用导致的级联性能问题特征

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Sudden increase from baseline (normal_median=26.58% to fault_median=92.81%, change_ratio=1.1095)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-03 节点的 node_cpu_usage_rate 指标是否出现异常飙升，重点关注中位数变化率是否超过阈值
